cases.sql: foo
cases.expected: foo

cases.sql: foo + "bar".baz
cases.expected: FOO + "bar".BAZ

cases.sql: SELECT a FROM x
cases.expected: SELECT a FROM x

cases.sql: SELECT A FROM X
cases.expected: SELECT A FROM X

cases.sql: SELECT "A" FROM "X"
cases.expected: SELECT "A" FROM "X"

cases.sql: SELECT a AS A FROM x
cases.expected: SELECT a AS a FROM x

cases.sql: SELECT A AS a FROM X
cases.expected: SELECT A AS A FROM X

cases.sql: SELECT * FROM x
cases.expected: SELECT * FROM x

cases.sql: SELECT A FROM x
cases.expected: SELECT a FROM x

cases.sql: SELECT a FROM X
cases.expected: SELECT A FROM X

cases.sql: SELECT a FROM X
cases.expected: SELECT a FROM x

cases.sql: SELECT A FROM x
cases.expected: SELECT A FROM X

cases.sql: SELECT A AS A FROM (SELECT a AS A FROM x)
cases.expected: SELECT a AS a FROM (SELECT a AS a FROM x)

cases.sql: SELECT a AS B FROM x ORDER BY B
cases.expected: SELECT a AS b FROM x ORDER BY b

cases.sql: SELECT A FROM x ORDER BY A
cases.expected: SELECT a FROM x ORDER BY a

cases.sql: SELECT A AS B FROM X GROUP BY A HAVING SUM(B) > 0
cases.expected: SELECT a AS b FROM x GROUP BY a HAVING SUM(b) > 0

cases.sql: SELECT A AS B, SUM(B) AS C FROM X GROUP BY A HAVING C > 0
cases.expected: SELECT a AS b, SUM(b) AS c FROM x GROUP BY a HAVING c > 0

cases.sql: SELECT A FROM X UNION SELECT A FROM X
cases.expected: SELECT a FROM x UNION SELECT a FROM x

cases.sql: SELECT A AS A FROM X UNION SELECT A AS A FROM X
cases.expected: SELECT a AS a FROM x UNION SELECT a AS a FROM x

cases.sql: (SELECT A AS A FROM X)
cases.expected: (SELECT a AS a FROM x)

cases.sql: SELECT a /* sqlglot.meta case_sensitive */, b FROM table /* sqlglot.meta case_sensitive */
cases.expected: SELECT a /* sqlglot.meta case_sensitive */, B FROM table /* sqlglot.meta case_sensitive */

cases.sql: SELECT COALESCE(json_val.a /* sqlglot.meta case_sensitive */, json_val.A /* sqlglot.meta case_sensitive */) FROM tbl
cases.expected: SELECT COALESCE(json_val.a /* sqlglot.meta case_sensitive */, json_val.A /* sqlglot.meta case_sensitive */) FROM tbl

cases.sql: SELECT @X
cases.expected: SELECT @X

cases.sql: SELECT `foo`, `BaR` FROM baz CROSS JOIN `bla` CROSS JOIN bloo
cases.expected: SELECT `FOO`, `BAR` FROM BAZ CROSS JOIN `BLA` CROSS JOIN BLOO
